summary: Cloudinary integration migration VERIFIED SUCCESSFUL. All file uploads now use Cloudinary instead of Emergent Object Store. Backend tests: 34/34 passed (100%). Frontend upload tested on Admin Home and Gallery - both return Cloudinary URLs (https://res.cloudinary.com/dh1sjguhz/...).
critical_code_review_comments: storage.py correctly uses Cloudinary SDK with put_object, get_object, delete_object functions
admin_routes.py upload endpoint returns Cloudinary secure_url directly (line 114)
Cloudinary credentials properly configured in backend/.env
No Emergent Object Store references remain in upload flow
seed_data_creation: Uploaded test images to Cloudinary during testing (hero image on home page)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudinary migration complete. All new uploads go to Cloudinary (https://res.cloudinary.com/dh1sjguhz/...). Existing gallery images still use old Unsplash URLs - this is expected. Home page hero image now uses Cloudinary. Backend storage.py uses cloudinary Python SDK. Upload endpoint returns direct Cloudinary URLs.
